text.tspan: Global death rate in violent political conflicts over the long run
Number of deaths per 100,000 people. Data collated from historical records by Peter Brecke. The data seeks to include
both combatant and civilian deaths in violent political conflicts due to fighting, disease, and starvation. But records are
incomplete, especially for the distant past and outside of Europe.
Data source: Brecke - Conflict Catalog (1999); Population based on various sources (2023)
